name: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang

reviews.originalComment: Berdih dan rapi, tertelatak diujung karang, jadi pemandangan cukup indah. Penginapan ini merupakan Badan Usaha milik Desa, yg dikelola oleh warga dan perangkat desa😍😍
reviews.reviewComments: Clean and tidy, lying at the edge of the reef, it makes for a quite beautiful sight. This accommodation is a business owned by the village, managed by the residents and village officials. 😍😍

reviews.reviewPositives: Location good for the view. But difficult to find food and far from other attractions place
reviews.reviewNegatives:
The room and bathroom not clean. The owner asked us to click not stay at his place when we check out. Seriously we dont understand his motive. We staying at this place for 2 nights and paid by cash. but the owner said we didn’t stay that his place to the booking.com. 
Unfortunately i didn’t request for the receipt when i paid.

reviews.reviewTitle: Recommended seaview room in Sabang Sumur Tiga
reviews.originalTitle: Recommended seaview room in Sabang Sumur Tiga
reviews.originalComment: Tipe penginapan keluarga, fasilitas lengkap, seaview, harga ramah, pelayanan bintang 5
reviews.reviewComments: Family accommodation type, complete facilities, seaview, friendly prices, five-star service.

reviews.originalComment: SGT2 BERTERIMA KASIH TERHADAP PENJAGA NYA ATAS KERJASAMA YG DIBERIKAN DAN LAYANAN YG BAGUS SEPANJANG KAMI MENGINAP DI SINI..TEMPAT PEMANDANGAN YANG INDAH DAN BILIK YG SELESA DAN HARGA MURAH..CADANG MAHU LG KE SINI.. INSYAALLAH (",)
reviews.reviewComments: SGT2 would like to thank the staff for the cooperation provided and the excellent service throughout our stay here. The beautiful scenery, comfortable rooms, and affordable prices make us want to come here again.. God willing (",)

reviews.originalComment: Penginapannya bagus, fasilitas lengkap & bersih, saran aja buat yg mau nginap jangan lupa stok makanan karna malam agak jauh ke kota & minim penerangan, utk minum udah ada dispenser & kulkas utk masukin minuman, kereeeen
reviews.reviewComments: The accommodation is good, with complete and clean facilities. A suggestion for those who want to stay is to stock up on food because at night it's a bit far to the city and there's minimal lighting. For drinks, there is already a dispenser and a refrigerator to store beverages, awesome!

reviews.originalComment: Penginapannya nyaman, ada AC, Bersih dan fasilitasnya lengkap, cuma kurang nya, mungkin bak mandi nya di bersihkan terlebih dahulu, cuma overall bagus dan nyaman nginap disini, dan tempat nya juga strategis, ga terlalu jauh dari pusat kota
reviews.reviewComments: The accommodation is comfortable, there is AC, clean, and the facilities are complete, but one downside is that the bathtub could be cleaned first. Overall, it is good and comfortable to stay here, and the location is also strategic, not too far from the city center.

reviews.originalComment: Berdih dan rapi, tertelatak diujung karang, jadi pemandangan cukup indah. Penginapan ini merupakan Badan Usaha milik Desa, yg dikelola oleh warga dan perangkat desa😍😍

reviews.originalComment:
Tempat yg bagus untuk menginap
Sayang,banyak pengunjung yg hanya sekedar berfoto tapi membuat sampah berserakan

Fasilitas kamar bagus,komplit
reviews.reviewComments: A nice place to stay. Unfortunately, many visitors only come to take photos but leave litter scattered around. The room facilities are good and complete.

reviews.originalComment: Menginap disini khusus untuk menikmati sunrise dan view gradasi lautnya yang indah
reviews.reviewComments: Staying here specifically to enjoy the sunrise and the beautiful gradient view of the sea.

reviews.originalComment: Untuk yang hobi mancing sangat direkomendasikan lokasi disini, karena dekat sekali dengan penginapan, tidak ada supermarket didekat lokasi hotel, tidur aman dan nyaman, AC menggigil, kebersihan perlu ditingkatkan, tidak menyediakan extrabed, tidak ada sarapan
reviews.reviewComments: For those who have a hobby of fishing, this location is highly recommended, as it is very close to the accommodation. There is no supermarket near the hotel, sleeping is safe and comfortable, the air conditioning is chilly, cleanliness needs to be improved, no extra bed is provided, and there is no breakfast.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi strategis... Dekat dgn kota.. Dgn pantai sumur tiga.. Dan pelabuhan.. Privasi terjaga.. Dan smoga next time bisa balik kesana bw rombongan buat acra bbq disana
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location... Close to the city... With Sumur Tiga beach... And the port... Privacy is maintained... And hopefully next time we can return there with a group for a BBQ event.

reviews.originalComment:
Keren tempat nya..
Saran sih..
Bagi yg hobi mancing... 
Wajib nih bawa pancing...
Next bakalan nginap lagi disini
reviews.reviewComments:
Cool place.. 
My suggestion is.. 
For those who love fishing... 
You must bring fishing gear... 
Next time I will stay here again.

Recommended with caution because:

The first access road is quite steep and high. If you’re driving a rental car like a Honda Brio, the bottom of the car might scrape.

Basic amenities such as body soap and shampoo are not provided.

However, the price is very reasonable, and the area is absolutely beautiful!
I went with a small group 4 people, the room is clean, the location is good, overall we satisfied....

reviews.originalComment: Kalau bisa ruangan nya atap nya di bersihin,ac nya kurang dingin,kamar mandi nya terlalu remang remang jd kesan nya horor
reviews.reviewComments: If possible, please clean the ceiling of the room, the air conditioning isn't cold enough, and the bathroom is too dim, giving it a horror vibe.

reviews.originalComment: Poor. Hygiene and service are both bad. They don't give change after receiving money and don't return documents actively.
reviews.reviewComments: Poor. Both hygiene and service are bad. They don't provide change after receiving money and don't actively return documents.
View cantik. Hotel yang selesa. Staff baik. Cuma kebersihan dan kemudahan kurang memuaskan.
Ada masalah dgn bilik, mujur staff bersedia utk membantu
Fasiliti sederhana sesuai dengan harga, hotel bajet
please be better
Places for restaurants not convenient
The hotel is located near to beach.
Aircond was hot.
Humble resort by the beach..very nice view and helpful staff especially the manager..

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan paling worth it  di sepanjang pantai sumur tiga untuk solo traveller.
reviews.reviewComments: The most worthwhile accommodation along the Sumur Tiga beach for solo travelers.

reviews.originalComment: Next nginap lagi tempat nya bagus cuma kurang bersihnlingan sekitarnya
reviews.reviewComments: Next stay again at a nice place, but the surrounding cleanliness could be improved.

reviews.originalComment:
Recomended!!! 
Bagus, bersih dan nyaman 
Untuk bawa pasangan wajib ada buku nikah ya guys 🙏
reviews.reviewComments:
Recommended!!!  
Good, clean, and comfortable  
If you bring a partner, you must have a marriage certificate, guys 🙏

reviews.originalComment: Untuk view bagus bgt krna pas di pantai ujoeng kareung
reviews.reviewComments: The view is great because it is by the Ujoeng Kareung beach.

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan staffnya luar biasa ramah dan berusaha gercep. Fasilitas sesuai harga, lokasi luar biasa apalagi ketika sunrise, beuh lagak that.
reviews.reviewComments: The staff service is incredibly friendly and tries to be quick. The facilities are appropriate for the price, the location is extraordinary, especially during sunrise, it's amazing.
Humble staff, great view

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya nyaman, utk santai dari hiruk pikuk kota, tapi tidak ada wifinya, padahal d aplikasi free wifi, tapi utk overall bagus semua
reviews.reviewComments: The place is comfortable for relaxing away from the hustle and bustle of the city, but there is no wifi, even though the app says there is free wifi; overall, everything is good.

reviews.originalComment:
Hotel dengan view terbaik..
Betah bgt😍
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel with the best view.. So comfortable😍

Penginapan yang bersih dengan pemandangan yang indah.. Fasilitas lengkap, AC , lemari, kloset duduk, TV, Handuk bersih, sabun. Fasilitas di atas rata2 dibanding dengan hotel sekelasnya. Dari kamar hotel bisa melihat sun rise secara lngsung. The best
Harga Terjangkau dengan Fasilitas Lengkap.
Harga Terjangkau dengan Fasilitas Lengkap.
very good and good view
Harga dan Fasilitas sesuai
Tempat lumayan bersih, cuma fasilitas kurang TV tdk nyala
AC tidak dingin😃.,
very recomended
view nya cakep
Sudah beberapa kali nginap, tapi baru kali ini nginapnya kurang nyaman. Sprei kotor krn disaat tidur terasa gatel. Saran, agar dilakukan pergantian sprei disaat tamu sudah Check Out. Terimakasih
Bolehlah

Saya datang ke hotel malam jam 22.00 wib krn perjalanan dr wisata... Tp smp disana tdk ada penjaga, di tlp berkali2 dan ditunggu 1 jam tdk ada jawaban. 

Terpaksa saya mencari penginapan malam itu di ditempat lain. Refund juga blm mendapatkan update nya. Sangat mengecewakan
Kamar nya cukup bersih, yapi kamar mandi nya engga bersih 😞
